name: Kindergarten Woodworking — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for wood properties, measuring with non-cutting tools, and workshop safety. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with wood properties, measuring with non-cutting tools, and workshop safety.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wood properties, measuring with non-cutting tools, and workshop safety through a close look at wood properties, measuring with non-cutting tools, and workshop safety.
